overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a character navigating industrial shipping containers, dark corridors, and a sunlit urban alley before entering a parking garage. The sequence features a mix of enclosed indoor spaces and outdoor areas with cyberpunk industrial aesthetics.

stack of metal barrels near the container entrance

segments.scene_description: The character walks across an industrial metal platform surrounded by shipping containers and enters a yellow container doorway, transitioning from the open platform into the enclosed container space.

events.description: exiting the yellow container into an open walkway beside a blue container

segments.scene_description: Moving through the narrow container corridor, the character emerges onto a walkway alongside a blue shipping container, passing wooden support structures in the industrial container yard.

segments.scene_description: The character navigates through darker indoor corridors with concrete walls and industrial lighting, approaching an NPC guard who opens a door to the outside, revealing bright sunlight.

damaged vehicle with red taillights glowing

elevated metal walkway connecting buildings above the alley

segments.scene_description: Emerging from the dark interior into a bright sunlit alley, the character passes the NPC guard and continues past a burning barrel and crashed car, moving through the narrow cyberpunk alleyway with overhead walkways.

scene_state.functional_zone: indoor parking garage with green lighting

events.description: entering the indoor parking garage from the alley

agents.ego_description: walking into a dimly lit parking garage with green fluorescent lighting and concrete pillars

segments.scene_description: The character enters an indoor parking garage with concrete pillars and greenish fluorescent lighting, moving deeper into the structure past storage crates and marked concrete floors.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a cluttered industrial container yard through dark interior corridors and into a sunlit urban alley before ending in a dim parking garage. It begins on an open metal platform, moving through the doorway of a yellow shipping container and along a narrow walkway flanked by blue containers and wooden supports. The scene then shifts into darker indoor corridors with concrete walls and industrial lighting, where the camera approaches a guard who opens a door to the outside. As the character emerges from the shadows, the lighting transforms into bright sunlight within a narrow cyberpunk alleyway filled with burning barrels, crashed cars, and overhead walkways. Finally, the camera moves from the outdoor glare into the greenish fluorescent glow of an indoor parking garage, passing concrete pillars and storage crates.
